creator: thiebaut.adsl@wanadoo.fr
text:
when calling pptp I get an error message, somthing to do with the "-direct" option apparently compiled (I'm not a C programmer but I looked in pptp.c and saw that) in pptp.

I tryed 20 different ways to install & use pptpclient but with no succes.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/net/pptpclient
make fetch
make extract
make patch
cd work/pptp*
vi Makefile (and modify /usr/sbin/ppp by /usr/sbin/pppd arround line 17)
cd ../../
make; make install
modify /etc/options & /etc/pap-secrets with my passwd & config
pptp 10.0.0.138
-> error !!! (-direct options unknown)
